title: feat: migrate Klein 4B from bpaigen.com to RunPod
author: voodoohop

gist.headline: Moving day for Klein
gist.blurb: We packed up the Klein 4B model and moved it to a new self-hosted setup. The new place has more space, meaning you can now cram up to 10 reference images into a single prompt.
gist.summary: Migrated the Klein 4B image model to a self-hosted RunPod backend, unifying the text-to-image and editing code paths.
gist.impact: Generations and edits using the Klein model now support up to 10 reference images, up from the previous limit of 4.
gist.visual_concept: Polly the bee and the Monitor Robot moving into a new server home. The robot is holding a stack of 10 polaroid pictures (reference images). Cozy, warm server room with plants.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of Polly the bee wearing a tiny sweatband, flying next to a chunky monitor-head robot who is happily carrying a tall stack of polaroid pictures. They are moving into a cozy server room with lime green (#ecf874) glowing lights and code-plants sprouting from the racks. Soft pastel gradient background, warm lighting, lo-fi 8-bit aesthetic like Stardew Valley.

image.prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of Polly the bee wearing a tiny sweatband, flying next to a chunky monitor-head robot who is happily carrying a tall stack of polaroid pictures. They are moving into a cozy server room with lime green (#ecf874) glowing lights and code-plants sprouting from the racks.
